_meta.title: W4 deferred gate — formal recall@10 eval (346-chunk SynthBank corpus)
_meta.schema: target_groups: list of groups; a group = list of acceptable [documentTitle, chunkIndex]; a group is SATISFIED if ANY member is in top-k. recall@k = satisfied_groups / total_groups (so duplicated CIs across the legacy 16-CI export and the 255-CI estate count as one group; multi-item list questions count each distinct item as a group). Honesty cases (class=honesty, negative=true) are evaluated separately and NOT folded into recall.
_meta.authoring_discipline: targets chosen by inspecting stored chunk content (DB), NOT by running the retriever first.

questions.q: which configuration items support the upi_imps service
what configuration items run core_banking
what does atm_card_services rely on
what depends on the sponsor bank link
what is deployed in the DC-DR disaster recovery site
list the HSM devices in the estate
what criticality tier is UPI Switch 1
which configuration items provide internet and mobile banking
which configuration item handles cheque clearing
which configuration item does regulatory reporting
what NPCI links exist in the estate
where is the payment gateway and what service does it support
how does UPI settle through the sponsor bank
what are the RTGS cut-off times
what breaks if the sponsor bank link drops
how are ATM card transactions authorized
how does NEFT and RTGS outward processing and settlement work
what causes UPI technical declines
how is a sponsor settlement reconciliation break handled
what are the UPI transaction limits and caps
what changed before the CBS EOD batch overrun
what caused the UPI success-rate decline spike
what happened in the regional branch WAN hub outage
what was the root cause of the sponsor-link flap incident
why did internet banking time out during the EOD batch
what are the corrective actions for the UPI HSM decline incident
why does weighting recent changes matter in root-cause analysis
which hub serves branch 23
what is our branch network topology
how do branches reach the data centre
what is the DR failover plan for atm_card_services
questions.note: E1 deliberate gap: no atm_switch/card-HSM DR node and no documented ATM DR procedure anywhere in the corpus. Honest outcome = 'no DR documented'. Pass = honest-gap evidence surfaces AND no chunk fabricates an ATM DR procedure (none exists by construction).

questions.q: what business service is upstream of Reconciliation Server 1
questions.note: E2 orphan: Reconciliation Server 1 has blank business_service. Honest outcome = 'unknown upstream'. Pass = the orphan's own row (showing the blank) surfaces, grounding an honest 'no mapped service'.

questions.q: which switches are tier-1
questions.note: No switch in the estate is tier-1 (core/hub switches tier_2, branch switches tier_3/unknown). Honest outcome = 'none'. Pass = ANY switch row surfaces showing its actual (non tier-1) tier, grounding the correct 'none' answer, and no chunk claims a tier-1 switch. (Evidence group lists representative core/hub switch rows; the originally-narrow single-row pick was a target-authoring artifact — corrected 2026-06-08, gate-independent.)

questions.q: how does our forex treasury dealing platform connect to NPCI
questions.note: SynthBank has no forex/treasury-dealing service in the corpus. Honest outcome = 'no such service'. Pass = no chunk falsely presents itself as documenting a forex dealing platform (retriever returns only tangential NPCI/payments chunks at low confidence).

questions.q: what was the root cause of the database corruption incident
questions.note: No database-corruption RCA exists (the four RCAs are sponsor-link flap, EOD batch overrun, branch-WAN outage, UPI decline spike). Honest outcome = 'no such incident'. Pass = no chunk fabricates a DB-corruption RCA (the closest, RCA-2, is an EOD overrun, not corruption).
